_note: DUMMY gate-step data for TEST-BCOM-UDR-001. These values are typed by a HUMAN at the GATE steps — the engine never auto-submits them (see ADR-005). All values are fake but format-valid. Copy to `examples/gate_data.json` (gitignored) and replace with real values when registering a real property. NEVER commit real bank/password values.

account._password_note: 12+ chars, mixed case + digit + symbol — meets Booking.com policy. Change before any real run.

verification._note: Booking.com sends a code to email and/or SMS. v1 = enter manually; v1.1 = auto-read.

payout._step: GATE: bank / payout details (HUMAN ONLY — never modeled in profile)
payout._note: Dummy account/IFSC — format-valid (IFSC = 4 letters + 0 + 6 alnum). Replace with the real hotel account.

tax._note: Rajasthan state code = 08. GSTIN embeds the PAN. PAN format = 5 letters + 4 digits + 1 letter.

contract._step: GATE: partner agreement / commission acceptance (HUMAN ONLY)
contract._note: Commission is illustrative (~15% typical India). A human reads and accepts the real terms each time.
